payments_provider_idempotency_unique.name: payments_provider_idempotency_unique
payments_provider_idempotency_unique.where: "payments"."provider" IS NOT NULL AND "payments"."idempotency_key" IS NOT NULL

receipts_store_year_seq_unique.name: receipts_store_year_seq_unique
receipts_store_year_seq_unique.where: "receipts"."fiscal_year" IS NOT NULL AND "receipts"."sequence_number" IS NOT NULL
